aux-agent-growing: Agent growth system - learn from experience, auto-evolve capabilities, accumulate knowledge and skills.
axu-data-analysis: Data analysis - organize data, find patterns, create charts.
axu-policy-interpretation: Policy interpretation - translate official language into actionable insights.
axu-report-writing: Report writing - draft materials, organize ideas, build frameworks.
axu-requirements-analysis: Requirements analysis - break down problems, clarify logic, find key contradictions.
axu-solution-design: Solution design - build frameworks from scratch, balance stakeholder needs.
axu-text-polishing: Text polishing - refine writing style, adjust tone, remove AI-sounding patterns.
browser_cdp: Connect to a running Chrome browser, scan local CDP ports, share one browser across agents.
browser_use: Complex web automation with Browser-Use (multi-step login, form filling, posting, data scraping).
channel_message: Proactively send one-way messages to users, sessions, or channels.
chat_with_agent: Consult other agents for help, or when user explicitly requests agent involvement.
cron: Scheduled task management: create/list/pause/resume/delete scheduled tasks.
dingtalk_channel: Auto-configure DingTalk channel integration using visible browser.
docx: Create, read, and edit Word documents (.docx files).
himalaya: Manage emails via IMAP/SMTP: list, read, write, reply, search.
humanizer-academic-zh: Academic Chinese Humanizer - polish papers, remove AI patterns, reduce AIGC detection.
long-running-agent-harness: Plan and structure large-scale AI agent work across multiple sessions.
make_plan: Request execution plans from stronger agents, get step-by-step actionable plans.
markitdown: Convert local documents to Markdown using markitdown CLI.
multi_agent_collaboration: Leverage other agents' expertise, context, or collaboration support.
news: Look up latest news from specified news sites and summarize.
pdf: PDF file operations: read, merge, split, watermark, encrypt.
pptx: PPT file operations: create, read, edit.
self-improvement: Capture learnings, errors, and corrections for continuous improvement.
skill-creator: Create new skills, modify existing skills, measure skill performance.
skill-vetter: Security-first skill vetting: check for red flags, permission scope, suspicious patterns.
superpowers-factory-bridge: Unified development orchestrator: integrate Superpowers methodology with AI code factory.
using-superpowers: Establish how to find and use skills in any conversation.
xlsx: Spreadsheet operations (.xlsx/.csv): create, edit, analyze data.
coapis_qa_guidance: Answer user questions about CoApis installation and configuration.
coapis_code_checked: Code review and problem diagnosis - review code like an architect, pinpoint root causes precisely.
